productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Pack of Five Pair Socks
description: Pack of five socks It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these pairs of socks from lino perros. A glimpse of these socks from beneath a rolled up pair of jeans adds a hint of eccentricity to your classic style. Presented in a stylish box. Made of Lycra One pair of grey socks with two vertical stripes One pair of black socks with two vertical stripes One pair of dark brown socks with two vertical stripes One pair of navy blue socks with two vertical stripes One pair of light brown socks with two vertical stripes Sock care Machine wash cold in not more than 30 degrees Do not dry clean Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not iron
